headline: Delek Gears Up to Report Q1 Earnings: Key Metrics to Watch
summary: DK heads into Q1 earnings with revenue pressure, rising costs and refinery downtime, even as optimization efforts may help cushion the impact.

headline: Phillips 66 Set to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
summary: PSX is projected to post a 55-cent loss in Q1 on $29.5B in revenues, with midstream revenues and product sales volumes expected to fall y/y.

headline: Wall Street Analysts Think Valero Energy (VLO) Is a Good Investment: Is It?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Valero Energy (VLO) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: Looking for Earnings Beat? Buy These 4 Top-Ranked Stocks
summary: Top-ranked stocks Kennametal (KMT), Reddit Inc. (RDDT), Valero Energy (VLO) and PIPER SANDLR CP (PIPR) are likely to beat on the bottom line in their upcoming releases.

headline: How The Valero Energy (VLO) Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And Lawsuit News
summary: Valero Energy’s modeled fair value has changed only slightly, moving from US$246.67 to US$247.33 per share, but that small adjustment follows a busy stretch of analyst activity. Across the Street, you are seeing higher price targets from several firms alongside a downgrade and a list removal, which together suggest a more debated view of where the shares should trade. Below, you will see how to interpret these moves and keep up with the evolving narrative around Valero. Stay updated as the...
